productDisplayName: Campbell Men Pack of 3 Solid Tshirts
description: Multipack &ndash buy three to give you colour options each morning. Set of three in red, grey and white Made of 100% premium cotton, innerwear t-shirts from campbell. These tees have a round high neck, short sleeves and printed branding inside for tag-free comfort. Wash care Machine wash Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron as needed Do not dry clean If you need a basic tee to keep you feeling fresh and provide a little warmth when the air conditioning gets too cold then you've found it here. Campbell knows what they're doing when they come up with practical basics which will make you look and feel great. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulder 18"
